decisions._comment: Hand-written reference. Conflict ids are deterministic from the candidate sets — when a real run produces these conflicts the ids will match. The values below describe the user's intent: pick newest source per conflict (Q10 default).
decisions.note: Accept v2 as superseding v1 — drops v1's session-cookie + 200-response claims.
README's stale session-cookie claim is rejected in favor of PRDv2 + ADR 0001's Bearer JWT.
